intro: The finance sector has been the primary target in a recent wave of attacks, with six high-severity incidents recorded between April 13 and April 23, 2026. Threat actors Storm-2755 and Tycoon 2FA were observed exploiting vulnerabilities to bypass multi-factor authentication, impacting organizations in Canada and globally. The affected sectors included finance, HR, payroll, and multiple others, underscoring the broad reach of these campaigns.
